findings.check: ATLAS heartbeat vs /api/integrity-status GI and mode
findings.detail: Heartbeat C-285 reports gi=0.75 mode=yellow source=live; integrity-status at verification time reports global_integrity=0.75 mode=yellow source=kv (not mock).

findings.check: KV / seed health (mock seed failure flag)
findings.detail: integrity-status.source is kv (not mock); ATLAS seed_result was 200 OK with kv_keys true in last heartbeat.
ATLAS anomalies array was empty; micro snapshot shows no named anomaly objects—only nominal/watch severities and agent healthy flags.
ZEUS-µ3, AUREA-µ2, and JADE-µ2 report healthy=false with no signal errors; several feeds at watch severity (WB GDP stale year, GDELT zero articles, Reddit zero posts).
GET /api/epicon/candidates returned count=0; no candidates, verification skipped (no verify/publish calls).

recommendation: Investigate persistent no-signal micro lanes (ZEUS-µ3, AUREA-µ2, JADE-µ2) and low freshness/information subscores; GI aggregate remains aligned with KV-backed integrity-status.
